product_overview: BST Otoservis is a cloud-based multi-tenant auto repair shop platform designed for Turkish service businesses to manage secure access, service operations, and customer communication. It supports mobile and admin login flows alongside core workshop workflows for service orders and messaging.
core_goals: Digitalize and streamline auto service workflows for independent repair shops
Provide secure multi-tenant architecture with complete data isolation
Enable mobile-first experience for both staff and customers
Support subscription-based business model with tiered pricing

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Allows customers and staff to sign in to the platform using the available login entry points, including OTP-based customer access.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter admin credentials -> Submit login form -> See authenticated admin access
Navigate to /superadmin-login -> Enter super admin credentials -> Submit login form -> See authenticated super admin access
Navigate to /m/musteri/login -> Fill license plate -> Fill phone number -> Submit form -> Enter OTP -> Verify OTP -> See authenticated customer access

features.name: Customer Login
features.description: Allows customers to log in on mobile using their vehicle license plate and phone number, then confirm access with an OTP.
user_flows: Navigate to /m/musteri/login -> Fill license plate -> Fill phone number -> Submit form -> Enter OTP -> Verify OTP -> See customer account access

features.name: Customer Login
features.description: Login with phone and license plate
